sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81929" key="peripleumonia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπλευμον-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n81929.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περιπλευμονία</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:187" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.187</biblScope> </bibl> (in form <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">περιπν</itype>-).</sense> </entryFree>
